textByHashes.14d68972bf6493d6c268f74cc7f5d26a69c8f4ad: Fascinating, fascinating. It's remarkable what these young dwarves have managed to create. Oh, hello young man.
textByHashes.3041e5e8364e2a904a42e97cded9681e563e8ec5: Fascinating, fascinating. It's remarkable what these young dwarves have managed to create. Oh, hello young woman.
textByHashes.098f4c74877c5c297069c72b970c6332f63bd65f: Fascinating, fascinating. It's remarkable what these young dwarves have managed to create. Oh, hello young one.
textByHashes.de153d38ba6aab192aa040b3daafae2ccd105a49: Ah, well I have been sent by King to talk with the dwarves here and find out more about their recent advances in technology.
textByHashes.a975a60cebb999865ae21d1e697714fe1340df35: The rideable carts are a very handy way to get to mining sites, and the Blast Furnace is a magnificent beast of a machine.
textByHashes.75c2fa65c4db2c933194e52c8c52cb4336dd9097: Just what I need. Dwarven cuisine is a bit ... solid for my tastes.
textByHashes.1a137ea7b37e288491955116ff003969687e5805: Here, take these Grand Seed pods. Very useful in emergencies!
textByHashes.23443493854c91dc502a62bbafb7b81bda10aa2f: Here have this, I traded for it with some of the dwarves.
textByHashes.038e8450018667842ad87ca182ca85da89b907a1: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
